queries.question: What's the maximum bag weight and maximum number of individual bag pieces allowed?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?mx WHERE { ?x a :BaggageLimits ; p:BagWeightLimit ?w ; p:BagPieceLimit ?pc . BIND(IF(xsd:double(?w) > xsd:double(?pc), ?w, ?pc) AS ?mx) }
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): SQLite 2-arg MAX(BagWeightLimit,BagPieceLimit) is row-wise greatest -> SPARQL IF

queries.question: What's the maximum bag weight allowed?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (MAX(?bagweightlimit_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?baggagelimits a :BaggageLimits .
  ?baggagelimits p:BagWeightLimit ?bagweightlimit_a .
}

queries.question: What are the maximum number of bag pieces allowed?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (MAX(?bagpiecelimit_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?baggagelimits a :BaggageLimits .
  ?baggagelimits p:BagPieceLimit ?bagpiecelimit_a .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What is the maximum baggage allowance?
